_publications._publicationTitle: Pathogenic neurofibromatosis type 1 (NF1) RNA splicing resolved by targeted RNAseq.

_contextSnippet: The glycine is conserved between species, the variant is not present in gnomAD and has, as annotated by Alamut strong disease causing in silico predictions
details: Provided accurate splicing predictions that were confirmed by experimental RNAseq results for multiple variants
